query:
ALTER TABLE detection_tests 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blueTeamOutcome VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'not_tested',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blueTeamNotes TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blueTeamAnalyst VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS detectionMethod VARCHAR(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS responseAction VARCHAR(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS timeToDetect INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS timeToRespond INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blueTeamUpdatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
command:

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blueTeamOutcome VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'not_tested',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blueTeamNotes TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blueTeamAnalyst VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS detectionMethod VARCHAR(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS responseAction VARCHAR(128),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS timeToDetect INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS timeToRespond INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blueTeamUpdatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL;
